panel.title: Error Logs by Error Type over Time Range

search.query: `sandfly_search_errors` log_mode=$tok_log_mode$ | rex field=error_log.error_msg "(?<t_error_tag>[^:]*)" | timechart count by t_error_tag

panel.title: Error Logs over Time Range by Error Type

search.query: `sandfly_search_errors` log_mode=$tok_log_mode$ | rex field=error_log.error_msg "(?<t_error_tag>[^:]*)" | stats count by t_error_tag

panel.title: Error Logs over Time Range by Target Address

search.query: `sandfly_search_errors` earliest=$tok_time1.earliest$ latest=$tok_time1.latest$ log_mode=$tok_log_mode$ | dedup error_log.host_id | rex field=error_log.error_msg "(?<t_error_tag>[^:]*)" | search t_error_tag="$tok_error_type$" | lookup sandfly_hosts.csv host_id AS error_log.host_id OUTPUTNEW os_info_node | eval os_info_node = if(isnull(os_info_node) OR len(os_info_node)==0, "<unknown>", os_info_node) | eval target_id = 'error_log.host_id' | eval target_name = os_info_node + " (" + 'error_log.hostname' + ")" | table target_id target_name | sort target_name

`sandfly_search_errors` log_mode=$tok_log_mode$ earliest=$tok_time1.earliest$ latest=$tok_time1.latest$ error_log.host_id="$tok_host_id$" | rex field=error_log.error_msg "(?<t_error_tag>[^:]*)" | dedup t_error_tag | sort t_error_tag

`sandfly_search_errors` log_mode=$tok_log_mode$ error_log.host_id="$tok_host_id$" | rex field=error_log.error_msg "(?<t_error_tag>[^:]*)" | rex field=error_log.error_msg "[^:]:\s(?<t_error_data>.*)" | eval t_error_data = if(isnull(t_error_data) OR len(t_error_data)==0, t_error_tag, t_error_data) | search t_error_tag="$tok_error_type$" | eval TimeStamp=strftime(_time,"%x %r") | sort - _time | lookup sandfly_hosts.csv host_id AS error_log.host_id OUTPUTNEW os_info_node | eval os_info_node = if(isnull(os_info_node) OR len(os_info_node)==0, "<unknown>", os_info_node) | table TimeStamp t_error_tag os_info_node error_log.hostname error_log.ip_addr error_log.queue_name t_error_data | rename t_error_tag as ErrorType | rename error_log.hostname as "Target Address" | rename error_log.ip_addr as IP_Address | rename os_info_node as "Host Name" | rename error_log.queue_name as QueueName | rename t_error_data as ErrorData
